overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through Night City's elevated highway system during golden hour. The journey begins at the Santa Anna intersection, continues under multiple overpass levels, turns at Monte Diablo, and ends at the Ash intersection, showcasing futuristic urban architecture with warm sunset lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway interchange under Santa Anna overpass

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green, vehicle accelerates through intersection
vehicle initiates wide left turn at the Santa Anna intersection

agents.ego_description: waiting at red light then accelerating through intersection and executing left turn under overpass

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving ahead through the intersection

entered.detail: green highway sign reading Santa Anna mounted on massive concrete overpass structure
multi-level concrete overpass with steel truss supports and heavy pillars
bold diagonal yellow striped pedestrian crossing markings on asphalt
sleek black futuristic sedan with illuminated red taillights

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at the Santa Anna intersection beneath a massive concrete overpass. The vehicle waits at a red light before accelerating through the intersection, following a futuristic black car. The camera executes a left turn, passing under the elevated highway structure with warm golden hour sunlight filtering through.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway corridor beneath stacked overpass levels

events.description: entering deeply covered area beneath multiple levels of highway infrastructure
ambient light drops significantly as driving deeper under shadowed overpass structure

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the covered highway corridor beneath stacked concrete overpasses

entered.detail: tall yellow industrial building with large black 04 signage and multiple windows
large metal lattice electricity pylon with multiple high-tension cables
large illuminated advertising screen displaying purple and green checkered graphics
green highway directional sign reading Monte Diablo approaching in distance

segments.scene_description: Driving through a canyon of concrete, the vehicle passes beneath multiple levels of stacked highway overpasses. The lighting shifts to deep shadow as the yellow building with 04 signage looms on the right and power lines stretch overhead. The Monte Diablo sign appears in the distance as the corridor narrows.

scene_state.functional_zone: Monte Diablo intersection with pedestrian walkways and decorative elements

events.description: approaching red traffic light at Monte Diablo intersection, slowing to stop
executing sharp right turn at Monte Diablo intersection onto open highway

agents.ego_description: slowing for red light at Monte Diablo then turning right, passing pedestrians on sidewalk

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking along sidewalk near the intersection corner

entered.detail: dried palm tree trunks hanging as decorations from the overpass structure
low dark industrial building with illuminated signage reading OCHO CINCO
distant reddish-brown mountains visible through haze beyond the city

segments.scene_description: Approaching the Monte Diablo intersection, the vehicle slows for a red light beneath decorative palm trees hanging from the overpass. After the light changes, the camera turns right, revealing pedestrians on the sidewalk and distant mountains beyond the industrial warehouse. The yellow building shifts to the left rear as the turn completes.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway approach to Ash intersection with industrial zone and mountain views

events.description: exiting covered overpass area into open highway with full sky visibility and mountain backdrop
approaching red traffic light at Ash intersection, slowing to stop behind truck

agents.ego_description: accelerating along open highway toward Ash intersection, following a truck

notable_agents.action: industrial truck driving ahead toward the Ash intersection

entered.detail: green highway sign reading Ash mounted on overpass structure ahead
large red corrugated metal warehouse with industrial tanks and pipes
curved elevated highway ramp extending into the distance on left side

segments.scene_description: Breaking out from under the overpasses, the scene opens to a wide highway with clear golden hour skies and distant mountains. The vehicle accelerates past elevated ramps toward the Ash intersection, where a large red industrial building stands on the right. The journey ends as the vehicle slows for a red light beneath the Ash sign.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a dense network of concrete overpasses that eventually opens into a wide, sun-drenched highway. It begins at the Santa Anna intersection, where the vehicle accelerates from a red light and follows a black car through a left turn under massive concrete structures filtered with golden hour sunlight. As the vehicle enters a canyon of stacked highways, the lighting shifts into deep shadow beneath overhead power lines and a yellow building with 04 signage before the Monte Diablo sign appears in the distance. The scene then transitions through the Monte Diablo intersection, passing decorative palm trees and pedestrians before turning right and leaving the industrial warehouses behind. Finally, the camera breaks out from the overpasses into a wide vista of clear skies and distant mountains, accelerating past elevated ramps toward the Ash intersection and a large red industrial building.
